solo el ingreso si vas por la Salta te confunde xq debes girar e ingresar por la otra calle. La atención es buena.

reviews.comment:
Pesima atención, me atendio Leonor, 0 idea de atención al cliente el trato fue deplorable. No les funcionaba mercadopago porque estaba caído, no me avisaron con antelacion de este problema y luego prosiguio a un pesimo trato mientras yo buscaba otro metodo para pagar. Ella no trato de solucionar el inconveniente y muy mal predispuesta a resolver el problema y no recibi ni un perdon por el inconveniente que ellos sabia que tenian y el problema no era mio. Muy mal servicio

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. Leonor helped me. She had no idea about customer service. The treatment was deplorable. Mercado Pago wasn't working because it was down. They didn't notify me in advance of this problem, and then proceeded with terrible treatment while I looked for another payment method. She didn't try to resolve the issue and was very unwilling to resolve the problem. I didn't even receive an apology for the inconvenience they knew they were having, and the problem wasn't mine. Very poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7293247840782148336/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNJeWNPblVBEAE
